statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Anton slice: Garage maintenance staging is now more useful on iPhone.

Changes:
- Added `Copy Buy List` to [garage.html](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.html:109).
- Added All / Need / Staged staging filters and need-only export logic in [garage.js](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.js:449).
- Added compact filter styling in [styles.css](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/styles.css:5903).
- Extended Garage smoke coverage in [Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1:544).
- Updated `ANTON.md`, roadmap, state, backlog, and quality audit notes.
- Bumped service worker cache to `ridgeline-console-v284`.

Verification:
- `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1 -Pages @('garage.html')` passed.
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- `Invoke-GarageRestoreAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v284-staging-filter-buy-list -SkipScreenshots` passed.
- Full `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1` passed for all default pages.
- `Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1` wrapper timed out, so I split and passed the underlying checks.
- Screenshot helper failed in the known way, so direct Playwright screenshots were captured:
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v284-staging-filter-buy-list-mobile-garage.png`
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v284-staging-filter-buy-list-desktop-garage.png`

Next clean slice: real iPhone review of the staging filter and Copy Buy List path before adding inventory storage, restorable staging state, or sync conflict behavior.
